text.title: GitOps — Progressive Delivery Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Canary promoted at 5min mark despite metric breach.
antipattern.fix: Add metric gate per step with explicit thresholds.

antipattern.symptom: Each rollout takes different time; debug impossible.
Canary looks healthy vs yesterday but worse than baseline.
